case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS WONG, DAVID F.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, DAVID F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
